title: Registration Open
message: Registration for FIFA 2026 Prediction Contest has started. Submit your entry fee of 15 SR and join the prediction group to participate.

title: Rules Published
message: Complete contest rules are now available in Malayalam. Please read carefully before participating. All participants must follow the rules strictly.

title: Tournament Format Update
message: FIFA World Cup 2026 features 48 teams, 104 matches across USA, Canada and Mexico. New format includes 12 groups of 4 teams and Round of 32.

title: Prize Pool Announcement
message: Exciting cash prizes for Champion, Runner Up, and Third Place. Special bonus prizes for top bonus question winners throughout the tournament!
